title: Eduardo Barreto
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Eduardo Barreto''' is an artist who provided the inks and pencils for the [[1997]] ''[[Star Wars: A New Hope - The Special Edition]]'' [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] series.
